_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Hlamula xinghana, u nghena.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yakhiwe ku vula eka ririmi ra le henhla. Ririmi rin'wana na rin'wana ri na mholo un'we wa ku hundzuluxiwa.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks yi nyikhiwa (ti-token ta ku teka xiphemu)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Xilotana xa tindzimi na tirate ta Marks a ku henhla na nkarhi. Marks ti-token ta ku teka xiphemu, hakunene a tihisa.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Hundzuluxa Liana Banyan eka {{language}}. Kuma {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Swikombelo swa Amukeriweni / Misava ya Swikwembu
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Manimelo ya ndlela na mitlhela ya swiboxi
speakFriend.claimBounty: Kombela Mholo Lowu wa Ku Hundzuluxiwa
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Ririmi ra ntlawa -- a ku na mholo wu lavekaka.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Rito ra Musimisi: Hikwalaho ka Tinyimpi Leti
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Rito ra le henhla na rin'wana eCross a ri vuliwile hi leswi. Ntlawa wa Mamingi 26 wa ntlawa.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Tiholo ta Ku Hundzuluxiwa ti Tirhisa Njhani
speakFriend.step1Body: Vula Mholo wa Ku Hundzuluxiwa eka Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Hundzuluxa swiringeti hinkwaswo. Rhumelela hi Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Endzhaku ka ku amukeriweni, u kuma Marks u ŋwala eka IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Vula munghana, uya."

languageSwitcher.tip: Tirhisa tisintha ta tindzimi tintshwa eka Ntsena wa Durin ku vula swiphiqo swa le henhla!
